narrative.description: Taito's fixed shooter pioneered the high-score arcade template with descending alien formations, destructible bunkers, and escalating speed that turns the final invader into a frantic dodge test.
narrative.core_loop: Move horizontally beneath the formation, shoot descending aliens before they reach the ground, and hide behind crumbling bunkers.

mechanics.map_notes: Aliens march in formation while the player fires upward from a fixed lane.
mechanics.expression: Aliens march in formation while the player fires upward from a fixed lane.

mechanics.map_notes: Random alien volleys create increasing bullet density as ranks thin.
mechanics.expression: Random alien volleys create increasing bullet density as ranks thin.

mechanics.map_notes: Three bases/lives per credit with continue on game over.
mechanics.expression: Three bases/lives per credit with continue on game over.

mechanics.map_notes: Speed increase as aliens die telegraphs escalating pressure.
mechanics.expression: Speed increase as aliens die telegraphs escalating pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: One hit destroys the cannon unless shielded by bunker.
mechanics.expression: One hit destroys the cannon unless shielded by bunker.

mechanics.map_notes: Bunkers erode from friendly and enemy fire, shrinking cover.
mechanics.expression: Bunkers erode from friendly and enemy fire, shrinking cover.

mechanics.map_notes: Single shot fires on button press with fire-rate limit.
mechanics.expression: Single shot fires on button press with fire-rate limit.

mechanics.map_notes: UFO bonus target appears on timed intervals.
mechanics.expression: UFO bonus target appears on timed intervals.

mechanics.map_notes: Formation descent accelerates as alien count drops.
mechanics.expression: Formation descent accelerates as alien count drops.

mechanics.map_notes: Each cleared wave spawns a deeper formation.
mechanics.expression: Each cleared wave spawns a deeper formation.

mechanics.map_notes: UFO bonus points reward timing and priority fire.
mechanics.expression: UFO bonus points reward timing and priority fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump and movement timing. (Space Invaders)
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump and movement timing. (Space Invaders)

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Space Invaders through its core shooter loop.
